title: Prompt: Image Quality Improvements
text: Create a [PLATFORM] banner for [CAMPAIGN_NAME]. Style: [BRAND_STYLE]. Include: headline text '[HEADLINE]', brand colors, and [VISUAL_ELEMENT]. Aspect ratio: [RATIO]. Mood: [MOOD].

title: Prompt: Moving Video of Peoples
text: Create a [PLATFORM] banner for [CAMPAIGN_NAME]. Style: [BRAND_STYLE]. Include: headline text '[HEADLINE]', brand colors, and [VISUAL_ELEMENT]. Aspect ratio: [RATIO]. Mood: [MOOD].

title: Prompt: Brand Identity Shot
text: Generate a professional brand identity image for [BRAND_NAME]. Use [PRIMARY_COLOR] and [SECONDARY_COLOR]. Style: [AESTHETIC]. Subject: [SUBJECT]. Background: [BG_TYPE]. Output: [FORMAT].

title: Prompt: Social Media Ad Copy
text: Write a compelling [PLATFORM] ad for [PRODUCT]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Tone: [TONE]. Include a CTA: [CTA]. Word limit: [LIMIT]. Hook: [HOOK_STYLE].

title: Prompt: Email Campaign Header
text: Design an email header for [CAMPAIGN_NAME] by [BRAND]. Dimensions: 600x200px. Include: [HEADLINE] text overlay, brand colors [COLORS], and [IMAGE_STYLE] background. CTA area at [POSITION].

title: Prompt: Product Photography Style
text: Generate a product photo of [PRODUCT] in [SETTING]. Lighting: [LIGHTING_STYLE]. Background: [BG_COLOR]. Camera angle: [ANGLE]. Mood: [MOOD]. Style: [PHOTOGRAPHIC_STYLE]. Resolution: [RES].
